name: Blinded
description: Loses Dex bonus to AC, takes a -4 penalty on most Strength- and Dexterity-based skill checks, and all attacks against it have a 50% miss chance from total concealment.

name: Dazzled
description: Takes a -1 penalty on attack rolls and Perception checks.

name: Deafened
description: Takes a -4 penalty on initiative checks and automatically fails Perception checks based on sound.

name: Entangled
description: Moves at half speed, cannot move at all if anchored, and must make a concentration check to cast spells.

name: Exhausted
description: Moves at half speed; resting for 1 hour reduces exhausted to fatigued.

name: Fatigued
description: Cannot run or charge while fatigued.

name: Frightened
description: As shaken, but the creature must flee from the source of its fear as best it can.

name: Grappled
description: Cannot move away from its grappler and loses its Dexterity bonus to AC against opponents it isn't grappling.

name: Prone
description: Gets +4 AC against ranged attacks but -4 AC against melee attacks; standing up provokes an attack of opportunity.

name: Shaken
description: Takes a -2 penalty on attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks.

name: Sickened
description: Takes a -2 penalty on attack rolls, weapon damage rolls, saving throws, and skill checks.

name: Stunned
description: Drops anything held, can't take actions, and loses any Dexterity bonus to AC in addition to the AC penalty.
